prediction.reasoning: Based on typical short-term stock volatility patterns, NKE has an annualized volatility of approximately 25-30%. For a 2-day horizon, this translates to roughly 2% daily standard deviation. The point estimate assumes no directional bias (random walk). Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with increasing width for higher confidence levels, accounting for the uncertainty inherent in short-term price movements.
